Temperature Sensor.name: TEMP_OUT_L
Temperature Sensor.description: Low Byte of Temp sensor data. To convert the output of the temperature sensor to degrees C use the following formula: TEMP_degC = ((TEMP_OUT - RoomTemp_Offset)/Temp_Sensitivity) + 21degC

fields.name: TEMP_OUT_L
fields.description: Low Byte of Temp sensor data. To convert the output of the temperature sensor to degrees C use the following formula: TEMP_degC = ((TEMP_OUT - RoomTemp_Offset)/Temp_Sensitivity) + 21degC

Power Management.name: LP_CONFIG
Power Management.description: LP configuration register controlling duty‑cycled mode for I2C master, accelerometer, and gyroscope.

fields.name: RESERVED7
fields.description: Reserved.

fields.name: RESERVED3_0
fields.description: Reserved.

fields.name: I2C_MST_CYCLE
fields.description: 1 – Operate I²C master in duty‑cycled mode. ODR is determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG register. 0 – Disable I²C master duty‑cycled mode.

fields.name: ACCEL_CYCLE
fields.description: 1 – Operate ACCEL in duty‑cycled mode. ODR is determined by ACCEL_SMPLRT_DIV register. 0 – Disable ACCEL duty‑cycled mode.

fields.name: GYRO_CYCLE
fields.description: 1 – Operate GYRO in duty‑cycled mode. ODR is determined by GYRO_SMPLRT_DIV register. 0 – Disable GYRO duty‑cycled mode.

Power Management.name: PWR_MGMT_1

fields.name: RSVD_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DEVICE_RESET
fields.description: Reset the internal registers and restores the default settings. Write a 1 to set the reset, the bit will auto clear.

fields.name: SLEEP
fields.description: When set, the chip is set to sleep mode (in sleep mode all analog is powered off). Clearing the bit wakes the chip from sleep mode.

fields.name: LP_EN
fields.description: The LP_EN only affects the digital circuitry, it helps to reduce the digital current when sensors are in LP mode.

fields.name: TEMP_DIS
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit disables the temperature sensor.

fields.name: CLKSEL
fields.description: Code: Clock Source 0: Internal 20 MHz oscillator 1-5: Auto selects the best available clock source – PLL if ready, else use the Internal oscillator 6: Internal 20 MHz oscillator 7: Stops the clock and keeps timing generator in reset

quality_issues: missing_register_page: source pages exist but logical register page is unknown

fields.name: RSVD_7_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DISABLE_ACCEL
fields.description: Only the following values are applicable: 111 - Accelerometer (all axes) disabled. 000 - Accelerometer (all axes) on.

fields.name: DISABLE_GYRO
fields.description: Only the following values are applicable: 111 - Gyroscope (all axes) disabled. 000 - Gyroscope (all axes) on.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved.

fields.name: REG_WOF_EN
fields.description: Enable wake on FSYNC interrupt.

fields.name: WOM_INT_EN
fields.description: Enable interrupt for wake on motion to propagate to interrupt pin 1.

fields.name: PLL_RDY_EN
fields.description: Enable PLL RDY interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1.

fields.name: DMP_INT1_EN
fields.description: Enable DMP interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT_EN
fields.description: Enable I2C master interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1.

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_OVERFLOW_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable interrupt for FIFO overflow to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: RSVD_7_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: WOM_INT
fields.description: Wake on motion interrupt occurred

fields.name: PLL_RDY_INT
fields.description: PLL ready interrupt

fields.name: DMP_INT1
fields.description: DMP generated INT1 interrupt

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT
fields.description: I2C master generated interrupt

fields.name: RSVD_7_5
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_WM_INT
fields.description: 1 - Watermark interrupt for FIFO occurred

fields.name: DELAY_TIMEH
fields.description: High-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event.

FSYNC.name: DELAY_TIMEL
FSYNC.description: Low-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event. Delay time in µs = (DELAY_TIMEH * 256 + DELAY_TIMEL) * 0.9645

fields.name: DELAY_TIMEL
fields.description: Low-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DELAY_TIME_EN
fields.description: Enables delay time measurement between FSYNC event and first ODR event

fields.name: WOF_DEGLITCH_EN
fields.description: Enable digital deglitching of FSYNC input for Wake on FSYNC

fields.name: WOF_EDGE_INT
fields.description: Select FSYNC interrupt edge/level for Wake on FSYNC

fields.name: EXT_SYNC_SET
fields.description: Select FSYNC pin data source for sampling

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved.

fields.name: DELAY_ES_SHADOW
fields.description: Delays shadowing of external sensor data until all data is received.

fields.name: I2C_SLV4_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 4 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV3_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 3 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV2_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 2 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 1 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 0 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

I2C Master.name: I2C_MST_STATUS

fields.name: PASS_THROUGH
fields.description: Status of FSYNC interrupt.

fields.name: I2C_SLV4_DONE
fields.description: Asserted when I2C slave 4’s transfer is complete, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted, and if the SLV4_DONE_INT_EN bit is asserted in the I2C_SLV4_CTRL register.

fields.name: I2C_LOST_ARB
fields.description: Asserted when I2C slave loses arbitration of the I2C bus, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: I2C_SLV4_NACK
fields.description: Asserted when slave 4 receives a NACK, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: I2C_SLV3_NACK
fields.description: Asserted when slave 3 receives a NACK, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: I2C_SLV2_NACK
fields.description: Asserted when slave 2 receives a NACK, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_NACK
fields.description: Asserted when slave 1 receives a NACK, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_NACK
fields.description: Asserted when slave 0 receives a NACK, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: ODR_ALIGN_EN
fields.description: 0: Disables ODR start-time alignment. 1: Enables ODR start-time alignment when any of the following registers is written (with the same value or with different values): GYRO_SMPLRT_DIV, ACCEL_SMPLRT_DIV_1, ACCEL_SMPLRT_DIV_2, I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.
